message.content: Search the codebase for any mocks of BackDropBottom or @semparar/design-system-app. Look in __mocks__ directories and jest setup files. Also check jest.config.js for moduleNameMapper. Find how the design system is mocked in tests. Also look at node_modules/@semparar/design-system-app/src to understand what BackDropBottom does (its index.tsx file). Return all relevant findings.

module.exports = {
  preset: 'react-native',
  moduleFileExtensions: [
    'ts',
    'tsx',
    'js',
    'jsx',
    'json',
    'node',
  ],
  clearMocks: true,
  transformIgnorePatterns: [],
  setupFiles: [],
  verbose: true,
  setupFilesAfterEnv: ['<rootDir>/__tests__/setup.js'],
  testMatch: [
    '<rootDir>/**/*.test.js',
    '<rootDir>/**/*.test.ts',
    '<rootDir>/**/*.test.tsx',
  ],
  testPathIgnorePatterns: [],
  coverageDirectory: '__tests__/coverage',
  moduleDirectories: [
    'node_modules',
    'src',
    '<rootDir>/__tests__/utils/test-utils.tsx',
  ],
  testResultsProcessor: 'jest-sonar-reporter',
};

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "allowJs": true,
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "baseUrl": "./",
    "rootDir": "./",
    "jsx": "react-native",
    "paths": {
      "~/store": ["./@types/store.d.ts"]
    },
    "lib": ["es2020"],
    "typeRoots": [
      "./@types",
      "./node_modules/@types"
    ],
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "noEmit": true,
    "strict": true,
    "target": "esnext",
    "strictNullChecks": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "noUnusedLocals": true
  },
  "include": [
    "./src",
    "./__tests__",
    "./@types",
    "./scripts"
  ],
  "exclude": [
    "node_modules",
    "babel.config.js",
    "metro.config.js",
    "jest.config.js"
  ]
}
